untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct bid-ask spread data and limit order execution probability estimates, which are NOT available in the allowed indicator set. The 55th percentile spread threshold, execution probability threshold (65%), and tick-level improvements cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-derived indicators. ATR is used as a proxy for spread width, but this is fundamentally incomplete without actual microstructure data.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used ATR as a rough spread proxy and body_pct as a normalized volatility measure. Used price improvement relative to prev_close as directional signal. However, this translation fundamentally fails to capture the microstructure logic of the original signal, which requires real-time bid-ask data, spread percentiles, and order execution probability estimates that are external to standard candlestick indicators.
